candidates.why: Semantically relevant for current debt, but values are blank in preview and may be an unused supplemental row.

variables.notes: Selected the financing-related current liability label in the current-liabilities section and excluded lease rows. Manual review needed because identical/near-identical bank-debt labels appear multiple times across sections, so current-vs-noncurrent classification and overlap cannot be verified with high confidence from the preview alone.
